title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rail Vikas Nigam

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rail Vikas Nigam
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rail Vikas Nigam family as a Logistics Manager in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rail Vikas Nigam:
Rail Vikas Nigam is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rail Vikas Nigam!
